system.description:
Roll +Soul when you try to show courage in the face of something truly terrifying.

10+: You look fear in the eye and do not break. Gain +1 forward when challenging it.

7-9: You stand strong but stay scared. Choose one: you're terrified and everyone knows; you take -1 forward when challenging it; you let your friends down but gain +1 forward when challenging it.

6-: You cower in fear, running from the fight, and take -1 forward when challenging it.

results.success: You look fear in the eye and do not break. Gain +1 forward when challenging it.
results.partial: You stand strong but stay scared. Choose one: you're terrified and everyone knows; you take -1 forward when challenging it; you let your friends down but gain +1 forward when challenging it.
results.failure: You cower in fear, running from the fight, and take -1 forward when challenging it.
